mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obpckgprcs-sql-oracle.xml - selectObHdByClassifCntrBarcode - 릴리즈정보 조회 BY 분류토트 */ SELECT OB.CTKEY , OB.OWKEY , OB.OBHDKEY , OB.WKTYPECD FROM ( SELECT OBHD.CTKEY , OBHD.OWKEY , OBHD.OBHDKEY , OBHD.WKTYPECD , ROW_NUMBER () OVER(ORDER BY COALESCE(OBHD.CLASSIFWKDATE, '20260131235959') DESC) AS RN FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OBHD INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CNTR CNTR ON OBHD.CTKEY = CNTR.CTKEY AND OBHD.CLASSIFCNTRBARCODE = CNTR.CNTRBARCODE INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WAHD ON OBHD.CTKEY = WAHD.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = WAHD.OWKEY AND OBHD.WAHDKEY = WAHD.WAHDKEY WHERE OBHD.CTKEY = COALESCE(#{ctkey}, #{sctkey}) AND OBHD.OWKEY = COALESCE(#{owkey}, #{sowkey}) AND OBHD.CLASSIFCNTRBARCODE = #{cntrbarcode} AND OBHD.OBWKDATE IS NOT NULL AND WAHD.WAWKSTATUSCD IN ('50', '60') /*50 : 작업중, 작업완료 */ AND WAHD.WKTYPECD IN ('DW') AND OBHD.OBSTATUSCD IN ('40','60','65','70','85') /*40: 미패킹, 60: 미출고, 65: 부분출고, 70: 출고완료,85: 결품처리확정 (헤더만사용) */ AND CNTR.CNTRDIVCD IN ('30', '40', '50') /*30: 분류TOTE(소) 40: 분류TOTE(중) 50: 분류TOTE(대) */ AND CNTR.CNTRWKDIVCD = 20 /*20: 분류용*/ ) OB WHERE RN = 1
mapper.sql: /* wms-outbound-obpckgprcs-sql-oracle.xml - selectCombnPckgObInfoSql - 포장처리 - 합포 출고정보 조회 SQL */ SELECT OBHD.CTKEY , OBHD.OWKEY , OBHD.OBHDKEY , COALESCE(WAHD.WAHDDAY,PREWAHD.WAHDDAY) AS WAHDDAY , COALESCE(WAHD.WARND, PREWAHD.WARND) AS WARND , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(OBHD.OBHDDAY, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS OBHDDAY , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(OBHD.OBREQDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS OBREQDATE , DLV.DLVRYCORPCD , DLV.DLVRYCORPNM , OBHD.OBORDKEY , OBHD.WBLNO , pkg_crypto$decrypt(OBHD.RCPPRSNNM, #{encKey}) AS RCPPRSNNM /*수령인명*/ , pkg_crypto$decrypt(OBHD.RCPPRSNTELNO, #{encKey}) AS RCPPRSNTELNO /*전화번호*/ , pkg_crypto$decrypt(OBHD.RCPPRSNADDR1, #{encKey}) AS RCPPRSNADDR1 /*주소1*/ , OBHD.DLVYMSG /* 배송메세지 */ , OBHD.OBSTATUSCD , OBHD.PREOBHDKEY , OBHD.PKOBHDKEY , OBHD.WKCNLREQYN /*작업취소요청여부*/ , RBOX.BOXNM AS RECOMBOXNM /*추천박스*/ , COALESCE(NISHD.OBNISNO,'') AS OBNISNO /*출고 결품 번호*/ , COUNT(OBDT.OBDTKEY) AS ICTYPECNT , SUM(OBDT.EXPCTQTY) AS TOTALQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OBHD /*출고 공통 정보*/ INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OBDT /*출고 상세 정보*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = OBDT.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = OBDT.OWKEY AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = OBDT.OBHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_BOX RBOX /*박스마스터(추천)*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = RBOX.CTKEY AND OBHD.RECOMBOXBARCODE = RBOX.BOXBARCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WAHD /*웨이브 공통 정보*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = WAHD.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = WAHD.OWKEY AND OBHD.WAHDKEY = WAHD.WAHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD PREOBHD /*이전 출고 공통 정보*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = PREOBHD.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = PREOBHD.OWKEY AND OBHD.PREOBHDKEY = PREOBHD.OBHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_HD PREWAHD /*이전 웨이브 공통 정보*/ ON PREOBHD.CTKEY = PREWAHD.CTKEY AND PREOBHD.OWKEY = PREWAHD.OWKEY AND PREOBHD.WAHDKEY = PREWAHD.WAHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_CNTR CNTR /*용기마스터*/ ON WAHD.CTKEY = CNTR.CTKEY AND OBHD.CLASSIFCNTRBARCODE = CNTR.CNTRBARCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_DLVRYCORP DLV /*택배사 마스터*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = DLV.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = DLV.OWKEY AND OBHD.DLVRYCORPCD = DLV.DLVRYCORPCD AND DLV.DELYN = 'N' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_NIS_HD NISHD /*출고 결품 헤더 정보*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = NISHD.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = NISHD.OWKEY AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = NISHD.OBHDKEY AND NISHD.CNFRMYN = 'Y' WHERE OBHD.CTKEY = COALESCE(#{ctkey}, #{sctkey}) AND OBHD.OWKEY = COALESCE(#{owkey}, #{sowkey}) AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} GROUP BY OBHD.CTKEY , OBHD.OWKEY , OBHD.OBHDKEY , WAHD.WAHDDAY , WAHD.WARND , PREWAHD.WAHDDAY , PREWAHD.WARND , OBHD.OBHDDAY , OBHD.OBREQDATE , OBHD.RCPPRSNNM , DLV.DLVRYCORPCD , DLV.DLVRYCORPNM , OBHD.OBORDKEY , OBHD.WBLNO , OBHD.RCPPRSNNM , OBHD.RCPPRSNTELNO , OBHD.RCPPRSNADDR1 , OBHD.DLVYMSG , OBHD.OBSTATUSCD , OBHD.PREOBHDKEY , OBHD.WKCNLREQYN , RBOX.BOXNM , NISHD.OBNISNO , OBHD.PKOBHDKEY
mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obpckgprcs-sql-oracle.xml - selectCombnPckgObInfo - 포장처리 - 합포 출고정보 조회 */
mapper.sql: /* wms-outbound-obpckgprcs-sql-oracle.xml - selectCombnPckgIcSql - 포장처리 - 합포 상품정보 SQL */ SELECT IC.IMGURL /*상품이미지 URL*/ , IC.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , IC.CUSHNMEPCKGYN /*완충재포장여부*/ , IC.DNGMGMTYN /*위험물관리여부*/ , ICB.BARCODE /*바코드*/ , OBDT.OBDTKEY , OBDT.OBDTSTATUSCD , OBDT.INITQTY /*초기수량*/ , OBDT.EXPCTQTY /*예정수량*/ , OBDT.CLASSIFSQTY /*분류수량*/ , OBDT.CNFRMQTY /*확정수량*/ , OBDT.PAKQTY /*패킹수량(완료수량)*/ , NISDT.NISQTY /*결품수량*/ , CASE WHEN NISHD.OBNISNO IS NOT NULL THEN NISDT.CNFRMQTY ELSE 0 END AS TOPAKQTY /*검수수량(출고수량화면입력값)*/ , 0 AS SEPQTY /*분리수량(박스추가시 사용)*/ , OBHD.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OBHD.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OBHD.PIHDKEY /*피킹헤더코드*/ , OBHD.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OBHD.PREOBHDKEY /*이전릴리즈코드*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OBHD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OBDT ON OBHD.CTKEY = OBDT.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = OBDT.OWKEY AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = OBDT.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OBDT.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OBDT.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OBDT.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICBARCODE ICB ON IC.CTKEY = ICB.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = ICB.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = ICB.ICKEY AND OBDT.UOM = ICB.UOM LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_NIS_HD NISHD /*출고 결품 헤더 정보*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = NISHD.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = NISHD.OWKEY AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = NISHD.OBHDKEY AND NISHD.CNFRMYN = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_NIS_DT NISDT /*출고 결품 상세 정보*/ ON NISHD.CTKEY = NISDT.CTKEY AND NISHD.OWKEY = NISDT.OWKEY AND NISHD.OBNISNO = NISDT.OBNISNO AND OBDT.OBDTKEY = NISDT.OBDTKEY WHERE OBHD.CTKEY = COALESCE(#{ctkey}, #{sctkey}) AND OBHD.OWKEY = COALESCE(#{owkey}, #{sowkey}) AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OBDT.OBDTSTATUSCD NOT IN ('01') /* 상세 '미할당' 건 제외 */ ORDER BY OBHD.OBHDKEY , OBDT.ICKEY
mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obpckgprcs-sql-oracle.xml - selectCombnPckgIcInfo - 포장처리 - 합포 상품정보 조회 */
mapper.sql: /* wms-outbound-obpckgprcs-sql-oracle.xml - selectPckgStatusSql - 포장처리 - 합포 상태정보 SQL */ SELECT OBHD.CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , OBHD.OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , OBHD.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OBHD.PREOBHDKEY /*이전 릴리즈코드*/ , OBHD.DLVRYCORPCD /*택배사코드*/ , DLV.DLVRYCORPNM /*택배사명*/ , OBHD.WBLNO /*운송장번호*/ , OBHD.OBSTATUSCD /*출고상태코드*/ , CASE WHEN OBHD.OBSTATUSCD IN ('60', '65', '70') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS SELECTYN /*ROW선택가능여부*/ , OBHD.WKCNLREQYN /*작업취소요청여부*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OBHD /*출고 공통 정보*/ LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_DLVRYCORP DLV /*택배사 마스터*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = DLV.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = DLV.OWKEY AND OBHD.DLVRYCORPCD = DLV.DLVRYCORPCD AND DLV.DELYN = 'N' WHERE OBHD.CTKEY = #{sctkey} AND OBHD.OWKEY = #{sowkey} AND (OBHD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} OR OBHD.PKOBHDKEY = #{pkobhdkey}) ORDER BY COALESCE(OBHD.PREOBHDKEY, OBHD.OBHDKEY), OBHD.OBHDKEY

/* wms-outbound-obpckgprcs-sql-oracle.xml - selectBoxBarcodeSql - 포장처리 - 포장박스정보 SQL */ SELECT CTKEY , BOXBARCODE , BOXNM FROM TWORK_MST_BOX WHERE CTKEY = COALESCE(#{ctkey}, #{sctkey}) AND BOXBARCODE = #{boxbarcode}
mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obpckgprcs-sql-oracle.xml - selectObNisDtForInsert - 포장처리 - 출고 결품보류 상세 등록대상 데이터 조회 */ SELECT #{ctkey} AS CTKEY , #{owkey} AS OWKEY , #{obnisno} AS OBNISNO , (COALESCE(MAX(CAST(NISDT.OBNISDTNO AS NUMERIC)), 0) + 1) AS OBNISDTNO , #{obhdkey} AS OBHDKEY , #{obdtkey} AS OBDTKEY , #{ickey} AS ICKEY , #{expctqty} AS EXPCTQTY , #{nisqty} AS NISQTY , #{pakqty} AS PAKQTY , #{nisprcsstatuscd} AS NISPRCSSTATUSCD , COALESCE(MAX(PTDT.PKIMPSYN), MAX(PREPTDT.PKIMPSYN)) AS PKIMPSYN FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OBHD LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_NIS_DT NISDT ON OBHD.CTKEY = NISDT.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = NISDT.OWKEY AND NISDT.OBNISNO = #{obnisno} LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PI_TOT_DT PTDT ON OBHD.CTKEY = PTDT.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = PTDT.OWKEY AND OBHD.PIHDKEY = PTDT.PIHDKEY AND PTDT.ICKEY = #{ickey} LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD PREOBHD ON OBHD.CTKEY = PREOBHD.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = PREOBHD.OWKEY AND OBHD.PREOBHDKEY = PREOBHD.OBHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PI_TOT_DT PREPTDT ON PREOBHD.CTKEY = PREPTDT.CTKEY AND PREOBHD.OWKEY = PREPTDT.OWKEY AND PREOBHD.PIHDKEY = PREPTDT.PIHDKEY AND PREPTDT.ICKEY = #{ickey} WHERE OBHD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OBHD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey}

/* wms-outbound-obpckgprcs-sql-oracle.xml - selectNisHoldCnfrmDt - 포장처리 - 결품보류확정 데이터 조회 */ SELECT OBDT.CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , OBDT.OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , OBDT.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈 코드*/ , OBDT.OBDTKEY /*릴리즈 상세 코드*/ , OBDT.OBDTSTATUSCD /*출고 상세 상태 코드*/ , CASE WHEN NISHD.REWKOBHDKEY IS NULL /*재작업 릴리즈 코드*/ THEN NISDT.NISQTY WHEN NISHD.REWKOBHDKEY IS NOT NULL THEN 0 END AS NISQTY /*결품 수량*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OBHD /*출고 공통 정보*/ INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_NIS_HD NISHD /*출고 결품 헤더 정보*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = NISHD.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = NISHD.OWKEY AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = NISHD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_NIS_DT NISDT /*출고 결품 상세 정보*/ ON NISHD.CTKEY = NISDT.CTKEY AND NISHD.OWKEY = NISDT.OWKEY AND NISHD.OBNISNO = NISDT.OBNISNO INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OBDT /*출고 상세 정보*/ ON NISDT.CTKEY = OBDT.CTKEY AND NISDT.OWKEY = OBDT.OWKEY AND NISDT.OBHDKEY = OBDT.OBHDKEY AND NISDT.OBDTKEY = OBDT.OBDTKEY WHERE OBHD.CTKEY = COALESCE(#{ctkey}, #{sctkey}) AND OBHD.OWKEY = COALESCE(#{owkey}, #{sowkey}) AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OBHD.OBSTATUSCD = #{obstatuscd} AND NISHD.CNFRMYN = 'Y' /*확정 여부*/

/* wms-outbound-obpckgprcs-sql-oracle.xml - selectCombnPckgIcTarget - 상품목록 대상 릴리즈코드 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBHDKEY FROM ( SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBHDKEY , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY OBHDKEY DESC) AS RN FROM ( SELECT CTKEY, OWKEY, OBHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD WHERE CTKEY = COALESCE(#{ctkey}, #{sctkey}) AND OWKEY = COALESCE(#{owkey}, #{sowkey}) AND OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} UNION ALL SELECT CTKEY, OWKEY, OBHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD WHERE CTKEY = COALESCE(#{ctkey}, #{sctkey}) AND OWKEY = COALESCE(#{owkey}, #{sowkey}) AND PKOBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} ) ) WHERE RN = 1
